description: Add the dev-workflow-init skill: a deterministic, offline-tested scaffolder (skills/dev-workflow-init/scripts/init_project.py, 14 unit tests) plus a table-of-contents SKILL.md that stands up the combined storybloq + superpowers dev workflow in a target project (.story/ memory skeleton, docs/superpowers/{specs,plans}, AGENTS.md + CLAUDE.md working agreement, storybloq runtime gitignore). Refuses to clobber without --force; supports --dry-run. Wired into README (Project setup section + skills table) and plugin.json keywords. skill_lint clean at 11 skills.
title: Add dev-workflow-init project-setup skill
